message:
perf(search): stack-buffer hex-encode in to_doc_id_string (wytpi)

Follow-up to axwps (0da64006). The remaining heap alloc in the doc_id
encoder was hex::encode(hash) allocating a 64-byte String that push_str
then copied into the pre-sized out buffer. Replace with hex::encode_to_slice
into a stack [u8; 64] + std::str::from_utf8 (hex output is always ASCII so
the utf8 validation never fails).

One fewer heap alloc per encoded doc_id when content_hash is Some — the
common indexing + query-resolution path. Byte-identical output verified by
the existing encode/parse roundtrip tests at vector_index.rs:443 and :467.

rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_cass_pane2 cargo test
--lib search::vector_index: 5/5 pass.

Closes coding_agent_session_search-wytpi.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
